data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption to protect data both at rest and in transit.

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Advanced IAM protocols safeguard user identities across Adobe's network.
data.technical_spec: Use of OAuth 2.0 and SAML 2.0 for secure user authentication.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits and penetration testing to identify potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Dynamic application security testing (DAST) tools employed.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust DDoS prevention mechanisms to mitigate potential distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Partnered with Cloudflare for DDoS protection services.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Implementation of a zero trust architecture to protect internal networks against breaches.
data.technical_spec: Continuous verification of user identity and device posture.
